parameters.query:
-- ========================================================================
-- ALLE PERIODEN BEIDER SCHULJAHRE FUER DAS HAUSHALTSJAHR
-- Ein Haushaltsjahr (Kalenderjahr) umfasst zwei Schuljahre:
--   Jan-Jul  = altes Schuljahr (z.B. 2025/2026)
--   Aug-Dez  = neues Schuljahr (z.B. 2026/2027)
--
-- Liefert ALLE Perioden mit ihren Lehrern + Deputaten.
-- Die App mapped DateFrom/DateTo auf Monate und speichert pro Monat.
--
-- Datum: 31.03.2026 | Basis: FIX 27.02.2026 (PATINDEX)
-- Rechtsgrundlage: § 3 Abs. 1 FESchVO — monatsgenaue Erfassung
-- ========================================================================

-- Beide relevanten Schuljahre ermitteln
WITH RelevanteSJ AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT SCHOOLYEAR_ID
    FROM Teacher
    WHERE Deleted = 0
      AND SCHOOLYEAR_ID IN (
          -- Aktuelles Schuljahr (MAX)
          (SELECT MAX(SCHOOLYEAR_ID) FROM Teacher WHERE Deleted = 0),
          -- Vorheriges Schuljahr (fuer Jan-Jul des Haushaltsjahres)
          (SELECT MAX(SCHOOLYEAR_ID) - 10001 FROM Teacher WHERE Deleted = 0)
      )
),
-- Alle Perioden dieser Schuljahre
AllePerioden AS (
    SELECT
        tr.SCHOOLYEAR_ID,
        tr.TERM_ID,
        tr.DateFrom,
        tr.DateTo,
        tr.Name AS Term_Name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY tr.SCHOOLYEAR_ID
            ORDER BY tr.TERM_ID
        ) AS rn
    FROM Terms tr
    INNER JOIN RelevanteSJ rsj ON tr.SCHOOLYEAR_ID = rsj.SCHOOLYEAR_ID
    WHERE tr.Deleted = 0
),
-- Naechste Periode je Schuljahr (fuer DateTo-Berechnung)
MitNaechster AS (
    SELECT
        ap.*,
        LEAD(ap.DateFrom) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ap.SCHOOLYEAR_ID
            ORDER BY ap.TERM_ID
        ) AS NextDateFrom
    FROM AllePerioden ap
)
SELECT
    t.TEACHER_ID,
    t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID,
    t.TERM_ID,
    t.Name,
    t.PNumber AS Personalnummer,
    t.OwnSchool AS Stammschule,
    CONCAT(t.Longname, ' ', t.FirstName) AS Vollname,
    ISNULL(TRY_CAST(t.PlannedWeek AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0) / 1000.0 AS Deputat,
    CONCAT(
        RIGHT('0000' + CAST(t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID / 10000 AS VARCHAR), 4),
        '/',
        RIGHT('0000' + CAST(t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID % 10000 AS VARCHAR), 4)
    ) AS Schuljahr_Text,
    mn.Term_Name,
    -- DateFrom: Periodenstart
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEFROMPARTS(
        mn.DateFrom / 10000,
        (mn.DateFrom / 100) % 100,
        mn.DateFrom % 100
    ), 104) AS DateFrom_Formatted,
    -- DateTo: Tag vor naechster Periode (oder Schuljahresende)
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -1,
        CASE
            WHEN mn.NextDateFrom IS NOT NULL THEN
                DATEFROMPARTS(mn.NextDateFrom / 10000, (mn.NextDateFrom / 100) % 100, mn.NextDateFrom % 100)
            ELSE
                DATEFROMPARTS(mn.DateTo / 10000, (mn.DateTo / 100) % 100, mn.DateTo % 100)
        END
    ), 104) AS DateTo_Formatted,
    -- Deputat GES (Department 1)
    CASE
        WHEN CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) > 0 THEN
            ISNULL(
                TRY_CAST(
                    LEFT(
                        SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20),
                        CASE
                            WHEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) > 0
                            THEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) - 1
                            ELSE LEN(SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20))
                        END
                    ) AS DECIMAL(10,2)
                ), 0
            ) / 1000.0
        ELSE 0
    END AS Deputat_GES,
    -- Deputat GYM (Department 2)
    CASE
        WHEN CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) > 0 THEN
            ISNULL(
                TRY_CAST(
                    LEFT(
                        SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20),
                        CASE
                            WHEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) > 0
                            THEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) - 1
                            ELSE LEN(SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20))
                        END
                    ) AS DECIMAL(10,2)
                ), 0
            ) / 1000.0
        ELSE 0
    END AS Deputat_GYM,
    -- Deputat BK (Department 3)
    CASE
        WHEN CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) > 0 THEN
            ISNULL(
                TRY_CAST(
                    LEFT(
                        SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20),
                        CASE
                            WHEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) > 0
                            THEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) - 1
                            ELSE LEN(SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20))
                        END
                    ) AS DECIMAL(10,2)
                ), 0
            ) / 1000.0
        ELSE 0
    END AS Deputat_BK
FROM Teacher t
INNER JOIN MitNaechster mn
    ON t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID = mn.SCHOOLYEAR_ID
    AND t.TERM_ID = mn.TERM_ID
WHERE
    t.Deleted = 0
    AND t.Longname IS NOT NULL
    AND t.Longname != ''
ORDER BY
    mn.SCHOOLYEAR_ID,
    mn.TERM_ID,
    t.Longname,
    t.FirstName;

nodes.name: Daten fuer Stellenist aufbereiten
nodes.notes: Gruppiert nach Periode, erzeugt pro Periode einen API-Call
